---
title: "DEGgo RNA-seq Report"
author: |
  DEGgo
  <br>
  <a href="https://github.com/ymbouamboua/DEGgo" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-ymbouamboua%2FDEGgo-181717?logo=github"
         alt="GitHub repository">
  </a>
  <a href="https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20785178" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://zenodo.org/badge/DOI/10.5281/zenodo.20785178.svg"
         alt="DOI badge">
  </a>
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
subtitle: "Automated bulk RNA-seq differential expression, visualization and enrichment analysis"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    theme: flatly
    self_contained: false
params:
  results: NULL
  sig_deg: NULL
  go_results: NULL
  summary: NULL
  metadata: NULL
  output_dir: NULL
  project_name: "DEGgo RNA-seq analysis"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

res <- params$results
results <- res

deggo_version <- tryCatch(
  as.character(utils::packageVersion("DEGgo")),
  error = function(e) res$version %||% "development"
)

project_name <- params$project_name %||%
  res$project_name %||%
  res$run_params$project_name %||%
  "DEGgo RNA-seq analysis"

deggo_citation <- paste0(
  "Yvon Mbouamboua, Vincent Prevot and Paolo Giacobini. ",
  "DEGgo: an automated R package for bulk RNA-seq differential expression, ",
  "visualization and enrichment analysis. Zenodo. ",
  "https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20785178"
)

outdir <- params$output_dir %||% res$output_dir
if (is.null(outdir) || is.na(outdir)) outdir <- getwd()
outdir <- normalizePath(outdir, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Detect analysis mode: single or pairwise
# ------------------------------------------------------------

analysis_mode <- params$analysis_mode %||%
  res$analysis_mode %||%
  res$mode %||%
  NULL

if (is.null(analysis_mode) || is.na(analysis_mode)) {
  analysis_mode <- if (
    dir.exists(file.path(outdir, "pairwise_results")) ||
    dir.exists(file.path(outdir, "pairwise_significant")) ||
    file.exists(file.path(outdir, "pairwise_summary.tsv"))
  ) {
    "pairwise"
  } else {
    "single"
  }
}

analysis_mode <- as.character(analysis_mode)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Generic DEGgo output paths
# ------------------------------------------------------------

summary_file <- file.path(
  outdir,
  paste0(analysis_mode, "_significant"),
  paste0(analysis_mode, "_summary.tsv")
)

if (!file.exists(summary_file)) {
  summary_file <- file.path(outdir, paste0(analysis_mode, "_summary.tsv"))
}

session_file <- file.path(outdir, "reproducibility", "sessionInfo.txt")
if (!file.exists(session_file)) {
  session_file <- file.path(outdir, "sessionInfo.txt")
}

manifest_file <- file.path(outdir, "reproducibility", "DEGgo_output_manifest.tsv")
if (!file.exists(manifest_file)) {
  manifest_file <- file.path(outdir, "DEGgo_output_manifest.tsv")
}

summary_tbl <- if (file.exists(summary_file)) {
  read.delim(summary_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
} else {
  NULL
}

manifest_tbl <- if (file.exists(manifest_file)) {
  read.delim(manifest_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
} else {
  NULL
}

session_txt <- if (file.exists(session_file)) {
  paste(readLines(session_file, warn = FALSE), collapse = "\n")
} else {
  NULL
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Main report objects
# ------------------------------------------------------------

md <- params$metadata %||% res$metadata
sig <- params$sig_deg %||% res$sig_deg
go <- params$go_results %||% res$go_results

sumtab <- params$summary %||%
  res$summary %||%
  summary_tbl


if (!is.null(sumtab)) {
  sumtab <- as.data.frame(sumtab, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  if ("significant" %in% names(sumtab) && !"significant_genes" %in% names(sumtab)) {
    sumtab$significant_genes <- sumtab$significant
  }

  if ("up" %in% names(sumtab) && !"upregulated" %in% names(sumtab)) {
    sumtab$upregulated <- sumtab$up
  }

  if ("down" %in% names(sumtab) && !"downregulated" %in% names(sumtab)) {
    sumtab$downregulated <- sumtab$down
  }
}



html_escape <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- gsub("&", "&amp;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("<", "&lt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub(">", "&gt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub('"', "&quot;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x
}

section_note <- function(title, text = NULL) {
  if (is.null(text)) {
    text <- title
    title <- "About this section"
  }

  cat(
    '<div class="section-box">',
    '<div class="section-title">', html_escape(title), '</div>',
    '<div class="section-text">', text, '</div>',
    '</div>'
  )
}

info_box <- function(title, text) {
  cat(
    '<div class="info-box">',
    '<div class="info-title">', html_escape(title), '</div>',
    '<div class="info-text">', text, '</div>',
    '</div>'
  )
}

expected_box <- function(items, title = "Expected pattern") {
  cat(
    '<div class="expected-box">',
    '<div class="expected-title">', html_escape(title), '</div>',
    '<div class="expected-text"><ul>',
    paste0("<li>", items, "</li>", collapse = ""),
    '</ul></div>',
    '</div>'
  )
}

success_box <- function(title, text) {
  cat(
    '<div class="success-box">',
    '<div class="success-title">', html_escape(title), '</div>',
    '<div class="success-text">', text, '</div>',
    '</div>'
  )
}

warning_box <- function(title, text) {
  cat(
    '<div class="warning-box">',
    '<div class="warning-title">', html_escape(title), '</div>',
    '<div class="warning-text">', text, '</div>',
    '</div>'
  )
}

html_card <- function(title, value, subtitle = NULL) {
  cat(
    '<div class="metric-card">',
    '<div class="metric-title">', html_escape(title), '</div>',
    '<div class="metric-value">', html_escape(value), '</div>',
    if (!is.null(subtitle)) {
      paste0('<div class="metric-subtitle">', html_escape(subtitle), '</div>')
    } else {
      ''
    },
    '</div>'
  )
}

metric_grid <- function(cards) {
  cat('<div class="metric-grid">')
  for (x in cards) {
    html_card(
      title = x$title,
      value = x$value,
      subtitle = x$subtitle %||% NULL
    )
  }
  cat('</div>')
}



html_box <- function(title, text = NULL, type = "info") {
  if (is.null(text)) {
    text <- title
    title <- switch(
      type,
      section = "About this section",
      expected = "Expected pattern",
      success = "Interpretation",
      warning = "Warning",
      info = "Information",
      "Information"
    )
  }

  cat(paste0(
    '<div class="', type, '-box">',
    '<div class="', type, '-title">', html_escape(title), '</div>',
    '<div class="', type, '-text">', text, '</div>',
    '</div>'
  ))
}



section_note <- function(title, text = NULL) html_box(title, text, "section")
info_box <- function(title, text) html_box(title, text, "info")
success_box <- function(title, text) html_box(title, text, "success")
warning_box <- function(title, text) html_box(title, text, "warning")

expected_box <- function(items, title = "Expected pattern") {
  html_box(
    title,
    paste0("<ul>", paste0("<li>", items, "</li>", collapse = ""), "</ul>"),
    "expected"
  )
}



html_card <- function(title, value, subtitle = NULL) {
  cat(paste0(
    '<div class="metric-card">',
    '<div class="metric-title">', html_escape(title), '</div>',
    '<div class="metric-value">', html_escape(value), '</div>',
    if (!is.null(subtitle)) {
      paste0('<div class="metric-subtitle">', html_escape(subtitle), '</div>')
    } else {
      ''
    },
    '</div>'
  ))
}




metric_grid <- function(cards) {
  cat('<div class="metric-grid">')
  for (x in cards) html_card(x$title, x$value, x$subtitle %||% NULL)
  cat('</div>')
}

show_table <- function(x, n = 20, caption = NULL) {
  x <- as.data.frame(x, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  if (!nrow(x)) {
    cat("<p><em>No table content available.</em></p>")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  if (is.finite(n)) x <- utils::head(x, n)

  print(
    knitr::kable(
      x,
      format = "html",
      row.names = FALSE,
      escape = FALSE,
      caption = caption,
      table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover table-condensed output-table'"
    )
  )

  invisible(NULL)
}

safe_list_png <- function(path, pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE) {
  if (is.null(path) || length(path) == 0 || anyNA(path) || !dir.exists(path[1])) {
    return(character(0))
  }

  list.files(
    path = path[1],
    pattern = pattern,
    full.names = full.names,
    recursive = recursive
  )
}

find_png <- function(path) {
  safe_list_png(path, pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
}

find_first_dir <- function(paths) {
  paths <- paths[!is.na(paths)]
  paths <- paths[dir.exists(paths)]
  if (!length(paths)) NA_character_ else paths[1]
}

get_output_dir <- function(key, candidates) {
  res$output_dirs[[key]] %||% find_first_dir(file.path(outdir, candidates))
}

clean_title <- function(x) {
  x <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(x))
  x <- gsub("_", " ", x)
  x <- gsub("Volcano Plot", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("GO terms", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("Heatmap", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("Sample Correlation", "Sample correlation", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("Hierarchical Clustering", "Hierarchical clustering", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  trimws(x)
}

figure_badge <- function(f) {
  b <- basename(f)

  if (grepl("Correlation|Clustering|QC|Library|Detected", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("QC")
  if (grepl("PCA", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("PCA")
  if (grepl("Volcano", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("Volcano")
  if (grepl("Heatmap", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("Heatmap")
  if (grepl("GO", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("GO")

  "Figure"
}

# html_img_src <- function(f) {
#   f <- normalizePath(f, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
#   out_abs <- normalizePath(outdir, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
#   sub(paste0("^", out_abs, "/?"), "", f)
# }

html_img_src <- function(f) {

  f <- normalizePath(f, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)

  original_outdir <- params$results$original_output_dir %||% outdir
  original_outdir <- normalizePath(original_outdir, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)

  sub(
    paste0("^", original_outdir, "/?"),
    "../",
    f
  )
}


plot_gallery <- function(files, badge = NULL, empty = "No figures found.") {
  files <- files[file.exists(files)]

  if (!length(files)) {
    cat("<p><em>", empty, "</em></p>")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  cat('<div class="figure-grid">')

  for (f in sort(files)) {
    title <- clean_title(f)
    img_src <- html_img_src(f)
    badge_i <- badge %||% figure_badge(f)

    cat('<div class="figure-card">')
    cat('<div class="figure-header">')
    cat('<span class="figure-badge">', html_escape(badge_i), '</span>')
    cat('<h3>', html_escape(title), '</h3>')
    cat('</div>')
    cat('<a href="', img_src, '" target="_blank">')
    cat('<img class="figure-img" src="', img_src, '" alt="', html_escape(title), '" title="Click to open full-size figure">')
    cat('</a>')
    cat('<div class="figure-footer">')
    cat('<a href="', img_src, '" target="_blank">Open full figure</a>')
    cat('</div>')
    cat('</div>')
  }

  cat('</div>')
  invisible(NULL)
}

describe_output <- function(x) {
  out <- rep("DEGgo output file or folder", length(x))

  out[grepl("results$", x)] <- "Complete differential expression results for all tested genes."
  out[grepl("significant$", x)] <- "Filtered significant DEGs according to selected thresholds."
  out[grepl("GO$", x)] <- "Gene Ontology enrichment tables for each comparison."
  out[grepl("GO_plots$", x)] <- "Visual summaries of enriched biological processes."
  out[grepl("heatmaps$", x)] <- "Heatmaps showing expression patterns of selected DEGs."
  out[grepl("PCA$", x)] <- "Principal component analyses used to assess sample structure."
  out[grepl("volcano$", x)] <- "Volcano plots displaying fold change and statistical significance."
  out[grepl("QC$|qc$", x)] <- "Quality control metrics, sample correlations and clustering."
  out[grepl("reproducibility$", x)] <- "Input summaries, metadata and run parameters required for reproducibility."
  out[grepl("summary\\.tsv$", x)] <- "Global summary of all differential expression comparisons."
  out[grepl("sessionInfo\\.txt$", x)] <- "R session information and package versions."

  out
}

interpretation_block <- function(section) {
  blocks <- list(
    qc = list(
      title = "QC interpretation",
      text = paste(
        "Samples should display comparable library sizes and numbers of detected genes.",
        "No strong outlier should dominate sample correlations or clustering.",
        "If obvious outliers are detected, they should be investigated before",
        "interpreting differential expression results."
      )
    ),
    pca = list(
      title = "PCA interpretation",
      text = paste(
        "Principal components should ideally separate samples according to the",
        "main biological variables of interest. Tight clustering of biological",
        "replicates supports the consistency of the dataset."
      )
    ),
    de = list(
      title = "Differential expression interpretation",
      text = paste(
        "Significant genes represent transcripts whose expression differs",
        "between the tested conditions according to the selected thresholds.",
        "Genes with large absolute log2 fold changes and low adjusted p-values",
        "are strong candidates for downstream validation."
      )
    ),
    volcano = list(
      title = "Volcano plot interpretation",
      text = paste(
        "Genes located in the upper-right region are significantly upregulated,",
        "whereas genes located in the upper-left region are significantly downregulated.",
        "Highlighted genes correspond to markers or genes of biological interest."
      )
    ),
    heatmap = list(
      title = "Heatmap interpretation",
      text = paste(
        "Samples sharing similar expression profiles should cluster together.",
        "Distinct expression patterns between experimental groups support",
        "the biological relevance of the detected differential expression."
      )
    ),
    go = list(
      title = "Gene Ontology interpretation",
      text = paste(
        "Enriched GO terms summarize biological processes overrepresented",
        "among differentially expressed genes. Related GO terms should be",
        "interpreted as broader biological themes rather than independent findings."
      )
    ),
    reproducibility = list(
      title = "Reproducibility",
      text = paste(
        "All analysis parameters, software versions and session information",
        "have been recorded to facilitate reproducibility and future re-analysis."
      )
    )
  )

  x <- blocks[[section]]
  if (!is.null(x)) success_box(x$title, x$text)
}

```



<style>
:root {
  --deggo-navy: #002B5C;
  --deggo-navy-dark: #001A38;
  --deggo-blue: #0057B8;
  --deggo-red: #D90000;
  --deggo-red-dark: #740001;
  --deggo-bg: #F8FAFC;
  --deggo-card: #FFFFFF;
  --deggo-text: #0B1F3A;
  --deggo-muted: #5B677A;
  --deggo-border: #DCE3EC;
}

body {
  font-size: 14px;
  background: var(--deggo-bg);
  color: var(--deggo-text);
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.main-container {
  max-width: 1280px !important;
}

h1, h2, h3 {
  font-weight: 750;
  color: var(--deggo-navy-dark);
}

h1 {
  margin-top: 42px;
  border-bottom: 4px solid var(--deggo-navy);
  padding-bottom: 10px;
}

h2 {
  margin-top: 34px;
  color: var(--deggo-navy);
}

a {
  color: var(--deggo-blue);
}

.metric-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 14px;
  margin: 20px 0;
}

.metric-card {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #F8FAFC 100%);
  padding: 18px;
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 1px solid var(--deggo-border);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.055);
}

.metric-card:nth-child(1) {
  border-top: 5px solid var(--deggo-navy);
}

.metric-card:nth-child(2) {
  border-top: 5px solid var(--deggo-blue);
}

.metric-card:nth-child(3) {
  border-top: 5px solid var(--deggo-red);
}

.metric-card:nth-child(4) {
  border-top: 5px solid #059669;
}

.metric-title {
  color: var(--deggo-muted);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 800;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}

.metric-value {
  font-size: 26px;
  font-weight: 850;
  margin-top: 8px;
  color: var(--deggo-navy-dark);
}

.metric-subtitle {
  color: var(--deggo-muted);
  margin-top: 6px;
  font-size: 12px;
}

.figure-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  gap: 24px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}

.figure-badge.Volcano { background: #740001; }
.figure-badge.Heatmap { background: #0057B8; }
.figure-badge.GO { background: #059669; }
.figure-badge.QC { background: #F97316; }

.figure-card {
  background: var(--deggo-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--deggo-border);
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 16px;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.065);
}

.figure-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  transition: 0.2s ease;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
}

.figure-header h3 {
  font-size: 16px;
  margin: 8px 0 0 0;
  line-height: 1.25;
}

.figure-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 4px 11px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--deggo-navy);
  color: white;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.figure-img {
  width: 100%;
  max-height: 650px;
  object-fit: contain;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid #EEF0F2;
  background: white;
  cursor: zoom-in;
}

.figure-footer {
  margin-top: 10px;
  font-size: 13px;
}

.figure-footer a {
  color: var(--deggo-blue);
  font-weight: 800;
}

.output-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  margin-top: 15px;
  background: white;
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.045);
}

.output-table th,
table.dataTable thead th {
  background: var(--deggo-navy) !important;
  color: white !important;
  text-align: left;
  padding: 12px;
  border-bottom: none !important;
}

.output-table td {
  padding: 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ECEFF4;
}

pre {
  background: #F3F7FC;
  color: var(--deggo-navy-dark);
  border-left: 5px solid var(--deggo-blue);
  padding: 16px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  max-height: 500px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.45;
  font-family: Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace;
}

code {
  color: var(--deggo-navy);
  font-weight: 600;
}

.section-box,
.info-box,
.expected-box,
.warning-box,
.success-box {
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 14px 18px;
  margin: 16px 0 22px 0;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
}

.section-title,
.info-title,
.expected-title,
.warning-title,
.success-title {
  font-weight: 800;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 12px;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.section-text,
.info-text,
.expected-text,
.warning-text,
.success-text {
  color: #374151;
  font-size: 14px;
}

.section-box,
.info-box {
  background: #F3F7FC;
  border-left: 5px solid var(--deggo-blue);
}

.section-title,
.info-title {
  color: var(--deggo-navy);
}

.expected-box {
  background: #FFF7ED;
  border-left: 5px solid #F97316;
}

.expected-title {
  color: #9A3412;
}

.warning-box {
  background: #FEF2F2;
  border-left: 5px solid #DC2626;
}

.warning-title {
  color: #991B1B;
}

.success-box {
  background: #ECFDF5;
  border-left: 5px solid #059669;
}

.success-title {
  color: #065F46;
}

.expected-box ul {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  .figure-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .metric-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  }
}
</style>



# Overview


Et dans le bloc **Overview**, sécurise aussi ceci :


```{r overview, results='asis'}

# Add in Overview
metric_grid(list(
  list(title = "Samples", value = if (!is.null(md)) nrow(md) else "NA"),
  list(title = "Genes analyzed", value = if (!is.null(sumtab) && "total_genes" %in% colnames(sumtab)) format(sumtab$total_genes[1], big.mark = ",") else "NA"),
  list(title = "Significant DEGs", value = if (!is.null(sumtab) && "significant_genes" %in% colnames(sumtab)) format(sum(sumtab$significant_genes, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ",") else "NA"),
  list(title = "Comparisons", value = if (!is.null(sumtab)) nrow(sumtab) else "NA")
))


success_box(
  "Biological take-home message",
  paste(
    "The strongest transcriptomic changes should be interpreted by combining",
    "the DEG summary, volcano plots, heatmaps and GO enrichment results."
  )
)

section_note(
  "Report overview",
  "This section summarizes the DEGgo analysis configuration, including the analysis mode, statistical method, organism, package version, and output directory."
)

analysis_mode <- res$run_params$analysis_mode %||% "NA"

analysis_label <- ifelse(
  analysis_mode == "pairwise",
  "pairwise differential expression analyses across multiple experimental groups",
  "a differential expression analysis"
)

# cat(
#   sprintf(
#     "<p>This report summarizes %s performed with <strong>DEGgo</strong>.</p>",
#     analysis_label
#   )
# )

info_box(
  "Project",
  html_escape(project_name)
)

metric_grid(list(
  list(title = "Project", value = project_name),
  list(title = "Analysis mode", value = analysis_mode),
  list(title = "Method", value = res$run_params$method %||% "NA"),
  list(title = "Organism", value = res$run_params$organism %||% "NA")
))

```


# Analysis interpretation guide

```{r interpretation-guide, results='asis'}

section_note(
  "How to read this report",
  "DEGgo reports are organized from quality control to biological interpretation."
)

info_box(
  "Recommended reading order",
  paste(
    "First inspect sample metadata and QC plots, then PCA and clustering.",
    "Only after confirming acceptable sample structure should differential expression,",
    "volcano plots, heatmaps and GO enrichment be interpreted."
  )
)

```


# Sample metadata


```{r sample-metadata, results='asis'}

section_note(
  "This section reports the matched sample metadata used for the analysis. Informative metadata variables are automatically summarized."
)

repro_dir <- file.path(outdir, "reproducibility")
metadata_file <- file.path(repro_dir, "clean_matched_metadata.tsv")
input_summary_file <- file.path(repro_dir, "clean_input_summary.tsv")

if (file.exists(input_summary_file)) {
  input_summary <- read.delim(
    input_summary_file,
    sep = "\t",
    header = TRUE,
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  cat("<h3>Input summary</h3>")

  if (all(c("metric", "value") %in% colnames(input_summary))) {
    cat('<div class="metric-grid">')

    for (i in seq_len(nrow(input_summary))) {
      html_card(
        as.character(input_summary$metric[i]),
        as.character(input_summary$value[i])
      )
    }

    cat("</div>")
  } else {
    show_table(input_summary, n = nrow(input_summary))
  }
}

md2 <- NULL

if (file.exists(metadata_file)) {
  md2 <- read.delim(
    metadata_file,
    sep = "\t",
    header = TRUE,
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
} else if (!is.null(params$metadata)) {
  md2 <- as.data.frame(params$metadata, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
} else if (!is.null(res$metadata)) {
  md2 <- as.data.frame(res$metadata, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
} else if (!is.null(md)) {
  md2 <- as.data.frame(md, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

if (!is.null(md2) && nrow(md2) > 0 && ncol(md2) > 0) {

  colnames(md2) <- make.unique(trimws(colnames(md2)))

  if (colnames(md2)[1] %in% c("", "X", "row.names", "Row.names")) {
    colnames(md2)[1] <- "sample"
  }

  keep_cols <- vapply(
    md2,
    function(x) any(!is.na(x) & trimws(as.character(x)) != ""),
    logical(1)
  )

  md2 <- md2[, keep_cols, drop = FALSE]

  if (!"sample" %in% colnames(md2)) {
    rn <- rownames(md2)

    if (is.null(rn) || all(rn == as.character(seq_len(nrow(md2))))) {
      rn <- seq_len(nrow(md2))
    }

    md2 <- cbind(sample = rn, md2)
  }

  rownames(md2) <- NULL
  md2[] <- lapply(md2, as.character)

  ## ------------------------------------------------------
  ## Automatic metadata summary
  ## ------------------------------------------------------
  
  excluded_vars <- c(
    "sample",
    "comparison_group",
    res$run_params$pairwise_contrast_col %||% NULL
  )
  
  summary_vars <- setdiff(names(md2), excluded_vars)

  summary_vars <- summary_vars[
    vapply(
      md2[summary_vars],
      function(x) {
        x <- as.character(x)
        x <- x[!is.na(x) & trimws(x) != ""]

        nlev <- length(unique(x))

        nlev >= 2 &&
          nlev <= max(20, floor(nrow(md2) * 0.8))
      },
      logical(1)
    )
  ]

  cat("<h3>Experimental design summary</h3>")
  
  if (length(summary_vars)) {
    
    meta_summary <- do.call(
      rbind,
      lapply(summary_vars, function(v) {
        
        x <- as.character(md2[[v]])
        x <- x[!is.na(x) & trimws(x) != ""]
        
        tab <- sort(table(x), decreasing = TRUE)
        
        data.frame(
          Variable = v,
          Level = names(tab),
          N = as.integer(tab),
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      })
    )
    
    cat(
      as.character(
        knitr::kable(
          meta_summary,
          format = "html",
          row.names = FALSE,
          align = c("l", "l", "r"),
          #caption = "Metadata summary",
          table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover table-condensed output-table'"
        )
      )
    )
    
  } else {
    cat("<p><em>No informative metadata variables detected.</em></p>")
  }
  
  
  ## ------------------------------------------------------
  ## Matched metadata table
  ## ------------------------------------------------------
  
  cat("<h3>Matched metadata</h3>")
  
  cat(
    paste0(
      "<p><strong>",
      nrow(md2),
      "</strong> samples × <strong>",
      ncol(md2),
      "</strong> metadata variables.</p>"
    )
  )
  
  cat("<details>")
  cat("<summary><strong>Show full matched metadata</strong></summary><br>")
  
  cat(
    as.character(
      knitr::kable(
        md2,
        format = "html",
        row.names = FALSE,
        caption = "Matched metadata",
        table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover table-condensed output-table'"
      )
    )
  )
  
  cat("</details>")
  
} else {
  cat("<p><em>No metadata table available.</em></p>")
}

```



# Preprocessing and normalization

```{r preprocessing-note, results='asis'}

section_note(
  "Preprocessing and normalization",
  "This section summarizes low-count filtering and normalization before differential expression analysis."
)

info_box(
  "Low-count filtering",
  paste(
    "Genes with very low read counts provide limited statistical power",
    "and may increase noise in differential expression testing.",
    "DEGgo removes low-expression genes according to the selected filtering parameters."
  )
)

expected_box(c(
  "A substantial number of low-count genes may be removed.",
  "Enough genes should remain for PCA, heatmaps and DE analysis.",
  "Filtering thresholds should be reported for reproducibility."
))

metric_grid(list(
  list(title = "Filter method", value = res$run_params$filter_method %||% "NA"),
  list(title = "Minimum count", value = res$run_params$min_count %||% "NA"),
  list(title = "Minimum samples", value = res$run_params$min_samples %||% "NA"),
  list(title = "Minimum total", value = res$run_params$min_total %||% "NA")
))

```


# Quality control

```{r qc-note, results='asis'}

section_note(
  "Quality control",
  "This section summarizes sample-level quality control, including library size, detected genes, sample correlation, and clustering."
)

info_box(
  "Sample distance and clustering",
  paste(
    "Sample correlation, distance heatmaps and hierarchical clustering help detect",
    "outlier samples and assess whether biological groups are globally consistent."
  )
)

expected_box(c(
  "Samples from the same biological condition should generally cluster together.",
  "No individual sample should be extremely distant from samples of the same condition.",
  "Strong batch or outlier effects should be investigated before interpreting DE results."
))

interpretation_block("qc")

```


## Sample quality assessment

```{r qc-gallery, results='asis'}

qc_dir <- get_output_dir("qc", c("pairwise_QC", "single_QC", "sample_QC"))

qc_files <- find_png(qc_dir)
qc_files <- qc_files[
  grepl(
    "Sample_Correlation|Hierarchical_Clustering|QC_Flags|Library_Size|Detected_Genes",
    basename(qc_files)
  )
]

plot_gallery(qc_files, empty = "No QC plots found.")

```


## Principal component analysis (PCA)

```{r pca-gallery, results='asis'}

section_note(
  "Principal component analysis",
  "PCA summarizes the main sources of variance across all genes in a reduced-dimensional space."
)

info_box(
  "How to interpret PCA",
  paste(
    "PCA helps determine whether the strongest transcriptomic variation is associated",
    "with the experimental design, such as treatment, tissue, sex, genotype or disease status."
  )
)

expected_box(c(
  "Samples should separate according to major biological variables.",
  "Replicates from the same group should remain close to each other.",
  "Unexpected isolated samples may indicate technical or biological outliers."
))

interpretation_block("pca")

pca_dir <- get_output_dir("pca", c("pairwise_PCA", "single_PCA", "PCA", "pca"))
pca_files <- find_png(pca_dir)

plot_gallery(pca_files, badge = "PCA", empty = "No PCA plots found.")

```


# Differential expression summary

```{r de-summary, results='asis'}

section_note(
  "Differential expression summary",
  "This section summarizes the number of differentially expressed genes for each comparison."
)

info_box(
  "How to interpret log2 fold change",
  paste(
    "A positive log2 fold change indicates higher expression in the first condition",
    "of the contrast. A negative log2 fold change indicates lower expression",
    "in the first condition compared with the reference condition."
  )
)

info_box(
  "Multiple testing correction",
  paste(
    "Because thousands of genes are tested simultaneously, DEGgo reports adjusted",
    "p-values to control the false discovery rate."
  )
)

metric_grid(list(
  list(title = "Adjusted p-value cutoff", value = res$run_params$padj_cutoff %||% "NA"),
  list(title = "log2FC cutoff", value = res$run_params$logfc_cutoff %||% "NA"),
  list(title = "Filter method", value = res$run_params$filter_method %||% "NA"),
  list(title = "Minimum count", value = res$run_params$min_count %||% "NA")
))

warning_box(
  "Interpretation limits",
  paste(
    "Differential expression results should be interpreted together with QC, PCA,",
    "sample clustering and biological context. Genes with very low counts or",
    "extreme outlier behavior may be filtered or assigned missing adjusted p-values."
  )
)

if (!is.null(sumtab)) {
  s <- as.data.frame(sumtab)

  metric_grid(list(
    list(title = "Comparisons", value = nrow(s)),
    list(title = "Significant DEGs", value = format(sum(s$significant_genes, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ",")),
    list(title = "Upregulated", value = format(sum(s$upregulated, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ",")),
    list(title = "Downregulated", value = format(sum(s$downregulated, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ","))
  ))

  show_table(s, n = nrow(s))

  ndeg <- sum(s$significant_genes, na.rm = TRUE)

  success_box(
    "Key finding",
    sprintf(
      "DEGgo identified %s significant differentially expressed genes across all comparisons using the selected thresholds.",
      format(ndeg, big.mark = ",")
    )
  )
} else {
  cat("<p><em>No DEG summary available.</em></p>")
}


```



## DE summary table

```{r analysis-summary}

summary_df <- sumtab

if (!is.null(summary_df) && nrow(summary_df) > 0) {
  summary_df <- as.data.frame(summary_df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  if ("significant" %in% colnames(summary_df) &&
      !"significant_genes" %in% colnames(summary_df)) {
    summary_df$significant_genes <- summary_df$significant
  }

  if ("significant_genes" %in% colnames(summary_df) &&
      !"significant" %in% colnames(summary_df)) {
    summary_df$significant <- summary_df$significant_genes
  }

  if ("up" %in% colnames(summary_df) &&
      !"upregulated" %in% colnames(summary_df)) {
    summary_df$upregulated <- summary_df$up
  }

  if ("down" %in% colnames(summary_df) &&
      !"downregulated" %in% colnames(summary_df)) {
    summary_df$downregulated <- summary_df$down
  }

  summary_df$comparison <- as.character(summary_df$comparison)

  comp_levels <- unique(summary_df$comparison)

  comparison_cols <- grDevices::hcl.colors(
    n = length(comp_levels),
    palette = "Set 3"
  )

  dt <- DT::datatable(
    summary_df,
    rownames = FALSE,
    options = list(pageLength = 10, scrollX = TRUE, dom = "tip")
  ) %>%
    DT::formatStyle(
      "comparison",
      backgroundColor = DT::styleEqual(comp_levels, comparison_cols),
      color = "#333333",
      fontWeight = "bold"
    )

  if ("significant_genes" %in% colnames(summary_df)) {
    dt <- dt %>%
      DT::formatStyle(
        "significant_genes",
        background = DT::styleColorBar(summary_df$significant_genes, "#DCE3EC"),
        backgroundSize = "98% 88%",
        backgroundRepeat = "no-repeat",
        backgroundPosition = "center"
      )
  }

  if ("upregulated" %in% colnames(summary_df)) {
    dt <- dt %>%
      DT::formatStyle("upregulated", color = "#740001", fontWeight = "bold")
  }

  if ("downregulated" %in% colnames(summary_df)) {
    dt <- dt %>%
      DT::formatStyle("downregulated", color = "#6497B1", fontWeight = "bold")
  }

  dt

} else {
  cat("No summary table available.")
}

```


## DE summary plot

```{r de-summary-plot}

if (!is.null(sumtab)) {
  s <- as.data.frame(sumtab)

  if (all(c("comparison", "upregulated", "downregulated") %in% colnames(s))) {
    plot_df <- rbind(
      data.frame(comparison = s$comparison, count = s$upregulated, regulation = "Up"),
      data.frame(comparison = s$comparison, count = s$downregulated, regulation = "Down")
    )
    
    ggplot2::ggplot(
      plot_df,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = stats::reorder(comparison, count, FUN = sum),
        y = count,
        fill = regulation
      )
    ) +
      ggplot2::geom_col(width = 0.8) +
      ggplot2::coord_flip() +
      ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = c(Up = "#740001", Down = "#6497b1")) +
      ggplot2::labs(x = NULL, y = "Number of DEGs", fill = NULL) +
      ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
      ggplot2::theme(
        legend.position = "top",
        panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10)
      )
  }
}

```


## Volcano plots

```{r volcano-gallery, results='asis'}

section_note(
  "Volcano plots",
  "Volcano plots display the relationship between effect size and statistical significance for each gene in each comparison."
)

info_box(
  "How to interpret volcano plots",
  paste(
    "Each point represents one gene. The x-axis shows log2 fold change,",
    "while the y-axis shows statistical significance. Genes on the right are upregulated;",
    "genes on the left are downregulated."
  )
)

expected_box(c(
  "Strong candidate genes combine large absolute log2 fold change and low adjusted p-value.",
  "Upregulated and downregulated genes should be interpreted together with the biological question.",
  "Highlighted genes are user-selected markers or genes of interest."
))

interpretation_block("volcano")

volcano_dir <- get_output_dir("volcano", c("pairwise_volcano", "single_volcano", "volcano"))
volcano_files <- find_png(volcano_dir)

plot_gallery(volcano_files, badge = "Volcano", empty = "No volcano plots found.")

```


## Heatmaps

```{r heatmap-gallery, results='asis'}

section_note(
  "Heatmaps",
  "Heatmaps show expression patterns of selected differentially expressed genes across samples."
)

interpretation_block("heatmap")

heatmap_dir <- get_output_dir("heatmaps", c("pairwise_heatmaps", "single_heatmaps", "heatmaps"))
heatmap_files <- find_png(heatmap_dir)

plot_gallery(heatmap_files, badge = "Heatmap", empty = "No heatmaps found.")

```


# Gene Ontology enrichment summary

```{r go-summary, results='asis'}

section_note(
  "Gene Ontology enrichment",
  "This section summarizes the number of enriched GO terms detected for each comparison and regulation direction."
)

info_box(
  "How to interpret GO enrichment",
  paste(
    "GO enrichment summarizes biological processes over-represented among significant genes.",
    "Upregulated and downregulated genes should be interpreted separately when available,",
    "because they may reflect opposite biological programs."
  )
)

expected_box(c(
  "Terms with low adjusted p-values are more statistically supported.",
  "Redundant GO terms should be interpreted as broader biological themes.",
  "GO enrichment supports interpretation but does not prove pathway activation by itself."
))

go_summary_file <- list.files(
  path = outdir,
  pattern = "merged\\.tsv$",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

go_merged <- NULL

if (length(go_summary_file) > 0) {

  go_merged <- utils::read.delim(
    go_summary_file[1],
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  metric_grid(list(
    list(
      title = "GO comparisons",
      value = if ("comparison" %in% colnames(go_merged)) length(unique(go_merged$comparison)) else "NA"
    ),
    list(
      title = "Unique GO terms",
      value = if ("ID" %in% colnames(go_merged)) length(unique(go_merged$ID)) else "NA"
    ),
    list(title = "Enriched rows", value = format(nrow(go_merged), big.mark = ",")),
    list(
      title = "Ontology",
      value = if ("ONTOLOGY" %in% colnames(go_merged)) paste(unique(go_merged$ONTOLOGY), collapse = ", ") else "BP"
    )
  ))

  if (all(c("comparison", "ID") %in% colnames(go_merged))) {

    if (!"Regulation" %in% colnames(go_merged)) go_merged$Regulation <- "All"

    go_summary <- as.data.frame(
      table(comparison = go_merged$comparison, Regulation = go_merged$Regulation),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    colnames(go_summary) <- c("comparison", "Regulation", "enriched_GO_terms")
    go_summary <- go_summary[go_summary$enriched_GO_terms > 0, , drop = FALSE]
    go_summary$enriched_GO_terms <- as.integer(go_summary$enriched_GO_terms)

    cat("<h3>GO terms per comparison</h3>")

    if (nrow(go_summary) > 0) {
      comp_levels <- unique(go_summary$comparison)
      comparison_cols <- grDevices::hcl.colors(length(comp_levels), palette = "Set 3")

      DT::datatable(
        go_summary,
        rownames = FALSE,
        options = list(pageLength = 10, scrollX = TRUE, dom = "tip")
      ) %>%
        DT::formatStyle(
          "comparison",
          backgroundColor = DT::styleEqual(comp_levels, comparison_cols),
          color = "#333333",
          fontWeight = "bold"
        ) %>%
        DT::formatStyle(
          "Regulation",
          color = DT::styleEqual(c("Up", "Down", "All"), c("#740001", "#6497b1", "#002B5C")),
          fontWeight = "bold"
        ) %>%
        DT::formatStyle(
          "enriched_GO_terms",
          background = DT::styleColorBar(go_summary$enriched_GO_terms, "#DCE3EC"),
          backgroundSize = "98% 88%",
          backgroundRepeat = "no-repeat",
          backgroundPosition = "center"
        )
    } else {
      cat("<p><em>No enriched GO terms found after summarization.</em></p>")
    }
  }

  ngo <- length(unique(go_merged$ID))

  success_box(
    "Key finding",
    sprintf(
      "%s unique Gene Ontology terms were enriched, providing functional insights into the biological processes associated with differential expression.",
      format(ngo, big.mark = ",")
    )
  )

} else {
  cat("<p><em>No merged GO summary file found.</em></p>")
}

interpretation_block("go")

```


## GO plots

```{r go-gallery, results='asis'}

go_dir <- get_output_dir("go", c("pairwise_GO", "single_GO", "GO", "go"))
go_files <- find_png(go_dir)

plot_gallery(go_files, badge = "GO", empty = "No GO plots found.")

```


# Output files

```{r output-files, results='asis'}

section_note(
  "Output structure",
  paste(
    "DEGgo automatically organizes results into dedicated folders.",
    "This structure improves reproducibility, downstream exploration,",
    "and sharing with collaborators."
  )
)

output_items <- list.files(
  path = outdir,
  full.names = FALSE,
  recursive = FALSE
)

if (length(output_items) > 0) {
  output_table <- data.frame(
    Folder = output_items,
    Content = describe_output(output_items),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  output_table <- output_table[order(output_table$Folder), ]

  knitr::kable(
    output_table,
    format = "html",
    row.names = FALSE,
    align = c("l", "l"),
    caption = "DEGgo output structure",
    table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover table-condensed output-table'"
  )
} else {
  cat("<p><em>No output files found.</em></p>")
}

```




# Reproducibility

```{r reproducibility, results='asis'}

section_note(
  "DEGgo automatically records all analysis parameters, software versions, package dependencies, and session information to ensure computational reproducibility and facilitate future re-analysis."
)

repro_dir <- file.path(outdir, "reproducibility")
run_params <- file.path(repro_dir, "run_parameters.tsv")

if (file.exists(run_params)) {
  cat("## Run parameters\n\n")
   knitr::kable(
    read.delim(run_params, stringsAsFactors = FALSE), 
    format = "html",
    row.names = FALSE,
    align = c("l", "l"),
    caption = "DEGgo reproducibility",
    table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover table-condensed output-table'"
  )
}

#session_file <- file.path(outdir, "sessionInfo.txt")
session_file <- file.path(params$output_dir, "reproducibility", "sessionInfo.txt")
if (!file.exists(session_file)) {
  session_file <- file.path(params$output_dir, "sessionInfo.txt")
}

if (file.exists(session_file)) {
  cat("\n\n## Session info\n\n")
  cat("<details><summary>Show session info</summary><pre>")
  cat(html_escape(paste(readLines(session_file), collapse = "\n")))
  cat("</pre></details>")
}
```




# Citation

```{r deggo-bibliography, results='asis'}

section_note(
  "Please cite DEGgo if it contributed to your analysis.",
  html_escape(deggo_citation)
)

```
